target: F64 same-shape select (Bool cond, F64 on_true, F64 on_false)

lever.description: Add select_f64_same_shape_fast_path to eval_select's Tensor/Tensor/Tensor arm: when cond is Bool and both operands are F64 same-shape, pick the selected operand's F64Bits directly, skipping the per-element select_bool_condition coercion and select_literal_as_dtype conversion. Returns None (fall through) if any cond element is not Bool or any operand element is not F64Bits.

baseline.note: fast-path guard temporarily removed; generic select_literal_as_dtype path

after.tool: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/select_1k_f64'

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Output elements produced in tensor index order; the same operand is selected per position as the generic path.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: select_literal_as_dtype(value, F64) is Literal::from_f64(f64::from_bits(bits)) for F64Bits, an identity; the fast path picks the same bits directly.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: None introduced; -0.0 and NaN payloads preserved (golden indices 3,4).
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.errors: Only Bool cond + F64/F64 same-shape selects take the fast path; non-Bool conditions, non-F64 operands, scalar operands, and shape mismatches use the generic path.
